rulings.Case Title: NATALIE BUFORD et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Have Discovery-Related Motion Heard Less Than 15 Days Before Trial
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 2, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Marc Paul, Inc.¿s motion for leave to have discovery-related motion heard less than 15 days before trial is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: NATALIE BUFORD et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Further Respond To Special Interrogatories (Set Two)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 2, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Marc Paul, Inc.¿s motion to compel plaintiffs to further respond to special interrogatories (set two) is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Compliance, Deeming Request For Admissions Admitted, And Requesting Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 2, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant McCord Corporation¿s motion for an order compelling compliance, deeming request for admissions admitted, and requesting sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant¿s motion to compel compliance is granted. Plaintiff¿s supplemental responses failed to provide sufficient responses pursuant to CCP 2033.220(a). Plaintiffs have 5 days to serve further responses. Defendant¿s motion to have the requests deemed admitted is denied. Defendant¿s request for sanctions is granted. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:15am in Dept. 503. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Compliance And Deeming Requests For Admissions Admitted
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 2, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant St. Francis Hotel Corporation¿s motion for an order compelling compliance, deeming request for admissions admitted, and requesting sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant¿s motion to compel further responses is granted. Plaintiff¿s supplemental responses failed to provide sufficient responses pursuant to CCP 2033.220(a). Plaintiffs have 5 days to serve further responses. Defendant¿s motion to have the requests deemed admitted is denied. Defendant¿s request for sanctions is granted. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:15am in Dept. 503. = (503/TLJ)
